title: When an item is created, create an item in .. Automation misbehaving

posts.author: jaydeflix (John Eddy)
posts.cookedHtml:
As part of a workflow problem, I’m trying to use this automation

and I find that with this configuration

image699×212 18.4 KB

the name of the item is taking the default name because it automatically saves before I can even edit it. So, basically, everything I create in Board A gets created in Board B as (in my sample) as New Campaign.

Since Board B is going to be shown as a calendar, it’s getting kind of silly since everything is called New Campaign. Is this a known issue or is there something I’m missing somewhere?
